title: Sum Two Numbers
description: Given two integers `a` and `b`, return the sum of the two integers.

driverCode.python:
import sys

if __name__ == '__main__':
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if len(input_data) >= 2:
        a = int(input_data[0])
        b = int(input_data[1])
        sol = Solution()
        print(sol.sum(a, b))

title: Reverse String
description: Write a function that reverses a string. The input string is given as a sequence of characters without spaces.

driverCode.python:
import sys

if __name__ == '__main__':
    s = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    sol = Solution()
    print(sol.reverseString(s))

hints: You can use two pointers, or built-in functions.

title: Square of a Number
description: Given an integer `x`, return the square of `x`.

title: Is Even
description: Given an integer `x`, return `true` if `x` is even, otherwise `false`.

title: Multiply Three Numbers
description: Given three integers `a`, `b`, and `c`, return their product.

driverCode.python:
import sys

if __name__ == '__main__':
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if len(input_data) >= 3:
        a = int(input_data[0])
        b = int(input_data[1])
        c = int(input_data[2])
        sol = Solution()
        print(sol.multiply(a, b, c))
